economic_notes: Band operates Iskut Band Development Corporation (Kluachon Centre Store, Eagle River Guide Outfitters, Kluachon Guide Outfitters, Zetu Construction). 33.33% interest in Tahltan Nation Development LP, Tahltan Nation Development Corp, Tahltan Legacy Corp. 33% interest in Tahltan Heritage Trust. Member of BCFN Gaming Revenue Sharing LP.
notes: Audit is qualified on multiple bases: (1) PS 3280 Asset Retirement Obligations not implemented; (2) Iskut Band Development Corporation should be consolidated but is accounted for using modified equity method and has no audited financials for 2023 or 2024; (3) Tahltan Nation Development LP/Corp and Tahltan Legacy Corp - unable to confirm appropriate accounting treatment due to scope limitation; (4) Tahltan Heritage Trust - unable to confirm whether portfolio investment or partnership. Total revenue of 24,764,185 excludes the 6,193,629 income from GBEs/partnerships which is reported separately below the line. Revenue figure used is the operating revenue subtotal. Total government transfers calculated as ISC 12,410,899 + CMHC 111,375 + FNHA 3,008,860 + FNESC 391,489 + Province of BC 863,402 = 16,786,025. Long-term debt includes capital loans 350,199 + CMHC mortgages 1,406,838 + obligations under capital lease 562,540 = 2,319,577. Annual debt service includes principal repayments on long-term debt 254,488 + capital lease repayments 180,598 = 435,086. Major deferred revenue item: $14,196,940 for Klappan Independent Day School Replacement construction. Band received 87% of revenue from ISC in 2024 vs 42% in 2023 - significant increase. TNDLP financial information only available to December 2022; Band's share of income reported is based on older data.
